title: Registry Feed Response
description: Response from GET /api/registry/feed and the `feed` event body from GET /api/registry/feed/stream. The events array contains cursor-ordered registry events; cursor is the value to pass on the next poll or stream reconnect. See specs/registry-change-feed.md.

cursor.description: Pass this value as cursor on the next request to continue polling. Null only when the feed has no events and no prior cursor.

has_more.description: True when more events are immediately available after cursor.

freshness.description: Consumer-visible feed freshness metadata for the requested type filter.

generated_at.description: Server timestamp when this feed page was generated.

latest_event_created_at.description: Newest event creation timestamp currently visible in the feed for the requested type filter. Null when no matching event exists inside retention.

lag_seconds.description: Seconds between generated_at and latest_event_created_at. Null when no matching event exists.

retention_days.description: Number of days the registry retains feed cursors and events.
